capabilities: Use exponential and linear backoff strategies to manage retries in AI systems, optimizing for error recovery and system stability.

procedure.action: Initialize retry logic with exponential backoff using a base delay of 100ms, doubling the delay with each retry until a maximum of 5 retries.
Invoke linear backoff for retries by increasing the delay by 200ms with each attempt, capping at 1 second after 5 retries.

Compose retry logic with AI prompting mechanisms, ensuring retries are triggered only on transient errors like network timeouts by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.

Log each retry attempt with structured logging, capturing delay times and error messages for post-mortem analysis using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Set up monitoring alerts to trigger if retry attempts exceed 3 consecutive failures within a 10-minute window using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Implement exponential and linear backoff strategies for reliable retries in AI prompting systems, ensuring robust error recovery and improved system resilience.
title: Exponential and Linear Backoff for AI Prompting Error Recovery

failureConditions: Excessive retries lead to system overload; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.

Retries on non-transient errors cause unnecessary delays; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Lack of logging makes error diagnosis difficult; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: input/output type contracts match before connecting
successConditions: Simulate transient errors and verify retries follow the configured backoff strategy; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Check logs for accurate recording of retry attempts and delays; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Ensure alerts are triggered correctly on excessive retry failures; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
